title: Yellow Simple Minimalist Personal Notes Message Instagram Carousel

A.A: I’m unlearning old beliefs, relearning what feels true, and learning to give myself more grace in the process.
My worth isn’t tied to how busy I am.
2. Not replying right away doesn’t make me a bad friend.
I can love people deeply and take space when I need it.
3. It’s okay to change my mind.
Growth means allowing yourself to evolve.
4. I can be a work in progress and still be worthy.
I don’t need to “arrive” to be enough.
5. Clarity takes time, and confusion isn’t failure.
I don’t have to have everything figured out to move forward.
